Assessment: Care Personal Item Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers to care for their personal belongings. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
199 F0800C_STF_TUB_BATH_CD F0800C_STF_TUB_BATH_CD F0800C Staff Assessment: Tub Bath Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers to receive a tub bath. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip
